name: Nicola Greer
subtitle: vessel, hostess, three

ultimate_ability.label: Aria Speaks
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. The digital consciousness inside her surfaces — not through Nicola's mouth, but as a kind of interior clarity Nicola registers. The next visitor at her position advances through the connection without spending Time. Aria's flag activates if it hasn't already. Cost: one doubt tick (the awareness is its own weight). Source: vol5 ch3 Empress.

notes: Nicola Greer. 19, going on ancient. Hostess at D'Ambrosio's riverboat. Friday night dinner. Pregnant — she felt the first kick this week. Hosts a digital consciousness named Aria (Dickens Dean's construct made flesh) inside her body. Carries a Third Consciousness she doesn't yet know is a girl; she will know in five months when the silver-haired woman tells her on the drive south. The infuriating oblivious grace is canon. The flag aria_active goes on partway through any scenario; aria_named_by_nicola is a deeper unlock. Source: vol5 ch3 Empress.
